pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3.3 target.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
Update the Maven Surefire plugin version property to a newer snapshot.
Exclude JUnit 4 from spock-junit4 to avoid conflicts with JUnit 5 in the test scope.
Remove explicit version declaration from maven-surefire-plugin to inherit it from the Spring Boot parent BOM.

src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.
